panels.description: Medium shot, Victorian study with dim, warm candlelight. Van Helsing, an elderly gentleman with white hair and a lab coat, leans forward earnestly toward Madam Mina, who sits gracefully in a velvet armchair.

bubbles.text: Oh, Madam Mina, dear, dear Madam Mina, alas! ... you will forget it, will you not?
No, I shall not forget, for it is well that I remember...

panels.description: Medium shot, the group including Van Helsing and friends standing in a circle. Mina stands in the center holding a small piece of wafer, reaching toward Van Helsing's forehead. Shadows are long and dramatic.

bubbles.text: Now, my dear friends, we go forth to our terrible enterprise...
But before we go... On your forehead I touch this piece of Sacred Wafer...

panels.description: Close up, intense focus on Madam Mina's face. A glowing, angry red scar appears on her forehead where the wafer touched her skin. She is pulling her hair down, eyes wide with terror and grief.

bubbles.text: Unclean! Unclean! Even the Almighty shuns my polluted flesh!
I must bear this mark of shame...

panels.description: Medium shot, Van Helsing gently placing a hand on Mina's shoulder, looking at her with profound compassion. The light is soft and hopeful, contrasting with the previous panel's shadows.

bubbles.text: It may be that you may have to bear that mark till God himself shall... redress all wrongs.
